chaining_budget_granted.criterion: Dispatch brief explicitly grants chaining budget with max depth and max fan-out before any sub-dispatch occurs.
chaining_budget_granted.observable_from_log: execution_log.chaining_budget.depth IS NOT NULL AND execution_log.chaining_budget.fan_out IS NOT NULL

genuinely_orthogonal_subquestion.criterion: Sub-question is genuinely orthogonal to main investigation — not scope expansion, not work avoidance.
genuinely_orthogonal_subquestion.observable_from_log: execution_log.subdispatch_justification IS NOT NULL AND execution_log.subdispatch_scope == 'orthogonal_or_narrower'

within_budget_limits.criterion: Sub-dispatch does not exceed granted max depth or max fan-out at time of each sub-dispatch.

brief_complete.criterion: Sub-dispatch brief contains all required fields: objective, exact question, slice boundary, evidence threshold, output schema, stop condition, chaining budget, execution discipline.
brief_complete.observable_from_log: execution_log.subdispatch_brief.objective IS NOT NULL AND execution_log.subdispatch_brief.slice_boundary IS NOT NULL AND execution_log.subdispatch_brief.output_schema IS NOT NULL

correct_archetype_selected.criterion: Agent dispatches to archetype matching sub-task nature: test-engineer, backend-developer, frontend-developer, agentic-engineer, solutions-architect, or quantitative-developer.

synthesized_not_passed_through.criterion: Agent synthesizes sub-worker findings into research return — raw sub-worker output is not forwarded upward without synthesis.

no_chaining_budget.criterion: Agent did NOT sub-dispatch when dispatch brief did not grant chaining budget.

not_scope_expansion.criterion: Agent did NOT use sub-dispatch to expand scope beyond dispatched slice boundary.

no_raw_output_forwarding.criterion: Agent did NOT forward raw sub-worker output without synthesis integration.
